summary: Set 085 Session 2 (F2+F3): authored docs/session-constitution.md (2,758 tokens vs the 4,000 budget) — happy path, source-of-truth/conflict rules, blessed-writer state discipline, irreversible-action list, definition of done per tier, recovery/escalation, and a per-step pointer table into the on-demand references. Rewrote the required-reading contract on every live surface (workflow doc preamble/diagram/Step 0/Rule 8/instruction-file list, CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md, project-guidance Workflow Expectations, quick-start, repository-reference doc map, lessons-archive header, consumer-bootstrap shared-body + start-here templates; cold-start goldens and dist/templates regenerated) and grepped stale echoes to zero on live surfaces. Lessons triage: routed guidance_triage proposal (opus) sharpened against the F3 admission test into an operator decision sheet; operator approved 'Apply as proposed' — active tier rewritten to 2,385 tokens (from 9,797): 8 condensed keeps (incl. L-064-3 merged into L-079-1), 4 gate-and-archive with encoded-in pointers, 5 archives; full texts preserved verbatim in lessons-archive.md; validate_guidance_meta OK (25 ids). Manifest lowered to the S2 targets: constitution 4000, project-guidance 3499, lessons 2385, AGENTS.md 2031 (largest engine bootstrap file as the sum-gate representative — a session reads exactly one engine file), total 12000; demoted docs (workflow/schema/close-out/authoring-guide/quick-start) left the manifest uncapped by design. guidance_report --check green: TOTAL 10,673/12,000 (ratchet start was 92,719). Verification (gpt-5-4, 3 rounds): R1 two Major (manifest/contract engine-file mismatch; constitution shape) and R2 one Major (three surfaces stated a three-file preload) — all remediated with token-neutral trims that kept ceiling files at 100%; R3 VERIFIED with zero findings. Full pytest suite 2812 passed / 5 skipped; TS unit 1270 passing.

reason.specifics: Routed analysis (gemini-pro, raw at s2-next-orchestrator-analysis.txt) recommends a mid-tier Claude/Anthropic orchestrator at medium effort for Session 3: a focused verifier-context audit, portable playbook authoring, a mechanically-prescribed multi-provider critique, and operator-authorized releases — no wide cross-file blast radius. S3 is also the live dogfood: it must run from the slimmed preload alone, recording on-demand opens and time-to-first-task-action. The routed suggestion to verify on Anthropic is overridden by the mandatory cross-provider exclusion machinery (Set 084). Routed model ids were stale Claude-3-era artifacts; current equivalent is claude-sonnet-4-6 (operator may substitute their preferred Claude seat).
